did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article summarizing various imaging techniques for melanocytic naevi and basal cell carcinoma. While it mentions computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) as a topic within the field, the authors did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain their own study results; they performed a literature review and integrative analysis of existing methods.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
